articles.title: KULR Technology purchases 217.18 Bitcoin for $21 Million, launches Bitcoin Treasury
articles.description: KULR Technology Group, Inc., an NYSE-listed company, has taken a shift in its treasury management by investing $21 million in Bitcoin by buying 217.18 BTC at an average price of $96,556.53.
